4seven.uk.title: First Dates
4seven.uk.description: There's a singing star this time and a sax player too. A couple of yachties. And an ex-copper from Essex seeks an alpha male fit to be a king. (S24 Ep4)

4seven.uk.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
4seven.uk.description: The potters make body part pots and sculptures of their bodies in motion, fired in brick kilns that they're building themselves. Who can carve out a place in the semi-final? (S9 Ep8/10)

4seven.uk.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours in Trieste
4seven.uk.description: Alan Davies and Joe Lycett traverse around Trieste, shoot the breeze at the Wind Museum, go food and fizz pairing in Prosecco, have a painting lesson and even pop into Slovenia. (S12 Ep1/5)

4seven.uk.title: Teleshopping
4seven.uk.description: Teleshopping.

4seven.uk.title: Teleshopping
4seven.uk.description: Teleshopping.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: The competition begins at The View in Tynemouth, run by Graeme and Brenda. Their B&B has royal history, but their guests don't think the shared bathrooms are very regal.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: Visit two is to the Northern Hotel in Brechin, Angus, where hosts Pawel and Joanna like to go the extra mile. Things start off brilliantly, but a breakfast breakdown could be costly.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: Jess hosts the third visit of the week, at The Kirkstyle Inn in Dunning, near Perth. She's hoping that the quirky style will be a hit, but two guests aren't fans of the open-plan design.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: The week's final visit is to Hazeldene Guest House in Perth, run by hospitality veterans Rob and Glenda. Their plan? Get their guests in good spirits with a trip to a whisky distillery.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: It's payment day, and time for the B&Bers to confront each other about their stays. There are some frosty heating comments and brekkie bombshells before the winners are revealed.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: Paul hosts the week's first visit at his seafront B&B in Swansea, where he's hoping stunning views and a watercolour masterclass will sail him to victory.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: Steve and Andrew host the week's second visit at Cae Court Hotel in Bridgend, where the B&Bers raise a tostada to a brilliant Spanish brekkie.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: The B&Bers visit Shaun and Sarah's glampsite in Aberystwyth, where a pair of resident diddy donkeys steal the show - and plenty of hearts.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: The week's final visit is to Fritha and Justin's country hotel in Flintshire, where things get frosty over al fresco drinks, and breakfast is chaotic.

4seven.uk.title: Four in a Bed
4seven.uk.description: It's payment day following a wonderful week in Wales. The problem is, none of the B&Bers can agree on what exactly was wonderful about it.

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Pip, Posy and their friends come up with some really imaginative handshakes to greet each other. Can the Milkshakers and Jen and Kemi come up with their own handshakes - and remember them? (Ep8)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Milkshake! Story Den
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Join Olivia for a story about a day when Georgia notices objects moving around the house. Is it something spooky!? Clever Georgia debunks the mysteries with explanations and no fear! (S3 Ep16)

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

Channel5Plus1.uk.description: National and international news.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Matt Allwright
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: Vanessa
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Good Ship Murder
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: When Jack recognises a notorious ex-con, things take a sinister turn. Meanwhile, Piers's rivalry with Jack spirals, setting the stage for a battle of wills that threatens their futures. (S2 Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: 5 News at 5

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Love Nature

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The Motorway
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: A 44-tonne freight lorry crashes and capsizes in the middle of the M6, an HGV almost catches fire when its brakes lock on, and a school bus breaks down in a dangerous spot. (S4 Ep8)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Celebrity Puzzling
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Host Jeremy Vine and team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman are joined by former royal correspondent Jennie Bond and comedian Shappi Khorsandi to test their puzzling prowess. (S2 Ep7)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: The Yorkshire Vet
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: Rohin Aojula helps a ewe that pushed out her uterus after giving birth, Julian Norton operates on a Dalmatian with an eye ulcer, and Peter Wright treats the oldest cow he's met. (S22 Ep2)

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: New: Stonehenge: Secrets of the New Stone
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In a TV first, Jason Watkins and historian Tracy Borman discover the answer to one of the final mysteries of Stonehenge - exactly where the six-tonne altar stone really came from.

Channel5Plus1.uk.title: The X-Files: Best Ever Episodes
Channel5Plus1.uk.description: In their hunt for a serial killer, Mulder and Scully try to enlist the help of an insurance salesman with psychic powers. (S3 Ep4)

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Rick Stein's Spain
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Rick heads for the Extremadura region - famous for pimenton and Spain's most celebrated ham, Iberico - and also visits Seville, the home of tapas and flamenco. S1 Ep4

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Vigilant Customs and Border Protection officers uncover 5,000 rounds of ammunition being smuggled across Hidalgo Bridge into Mexico. S1 Ep8

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Border Force America's Gatekeepers
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: A new recruit fresh out of training school makes her mark when she uncovers 12kg of cocaine hidden in a car that she has stopped on one of the bridges. S1 Ep9

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Romania: Jamie-Lee O'Donnell and Saoirse-Monica Jackson, who are best friends and stars of the hit sitcom Derry Girls, head way out of their comfort zone as they tackle rugged Romania. S4 Ep6

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Motoring madness. James learns why the Finns are such good racing drivers, Richard tests the outlandish Veritas sports car, and film star Mark Wahlberg guests. S12 Ep3

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Top Gear
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Four-wheeled fun with Clarkson and co. The boys try to drive from Switzerland to Blackpool on one tank of fuel, James tests a Pagani Zonda F Roadster, and the Stig fulfils a dream. S12 Ep4

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Bread: The bikers explore how our love affair with bread has evolved over centuries, trying their hand at bagel making and their own version of a summer pudding. S1 Ep2

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Rick Stein's Spain
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Rick heads for the Extremadura region - famous for pimenton and Spain's most celebrated ham, Iberico - and also visits Seville, the home of tapas and flamenco. S1 Ep4

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Would I Lie To You?
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Rob Brydon, Lee Mack and David Mitchell are joined by Clare Balding, Asim Chaudhry, Victoria Coren Mitchell and Greg James. S13 Ep2

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: The best-selling writer and Pointless regular invites comedians Jayde Adams and Rufus Hound, TV presenter Josie d'Arby, and radio DJ Scott Mills to test their general knowledge skills. S4 Ep12

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Not-so-Pointless quizzing action with Mark Billingham, Neil Delamere, AJ Odudu and Lucy Porter, who are all invited to test their general knowledge skills in this edition. S4 Ep17

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: QI XL
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Geometry: Stephen Fry hosts the learned quiz show in which contestants have 'quite interesting' answers rewarded. The panel try to prove they are not obtuse when it comes to geometry. S7 Ep16

UAndDavejavu.uk.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
UAndDavejavu.uk.description: Kevin Bridges is host as journalist Helen Lewis and comedian Chloe Petts join team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to delve into the news. S68 Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUK.uk.description: Lost Souls Of Kingman. The crew investigate an Arizona high school plagued by troubling paranormal experiences. Is this linked to an abandoned cemetery buried beneath the building? S20, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUK.uk.description: Old Bullion Plaza School. The crew unlock the dark secrets entombed in the walls of an old school. During the investigation, they capture some of their best evidence in years. S20, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Alarming Asylum. In the UK, a trio of explorers visit an abandoned asylum. In New York, a family are freaked out by a door-slamming, doorbell-ringing phantom! S4, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUK.uk.description: Sirens In The Sea. A Massachusetts sailor is shocked to his core when a sinister sound calls out at sea. In the UK, a paranormal believer reveals her collection of ghost pictures. S4, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Breaking the Bank. The Baggage Battlers head to Atlanta, Georgia, to a freight auction where Mark spies some Rolls Royce aircraft parts, but will his bid secure the items? S2, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Greedy Pig. The buyers head south again, this time to the affluent Atlanta suburb of Alpharetta, seeking valuable items at a local Man Cave auction. But who will come away happy? S4, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Walk the Plank. Super Auctions collects some of the most iconic items from Orlando's star attractions and sells them to the highest bidder. How will the buyers get on? S4, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: It's Not Easy Making Green. The buyers have travelled to Allentown in search of old money. Items up for grabs today include rare Civil War-era objects from Gettysburg. S4, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Dino Mite. Vintage advertising pits the buyers against each other in Knoxville, where Sally spends big to win a dinosaur. Meanwhile, Billy's attempt at sabotage backfires. S4, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Big Boy Bucks. The buyers take a gamble on vintage casino and advertising items, including a Bob's Big Boy statue in Vegas. Meanwhile, a rare Elvis recording could pay off big time. S4, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Gunning for Dollars. A giant Gatling gun and a rare advertising piece from Nabisco Cookies are among the items that interest the buyers at a gambling auction in Las Vegas. S4, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Wizard of Odd. A lost property auction in reveals an old-school boom box from the 1980s, while a buyer is over the rainbow about a rare 'Wizard of Oz' piece in a sealed trunk. S4, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Safari Sale. The buyers visit South Africa for a once-in-a-lifetime auction, and Billy appraises a ceremonial mask. Will profit still be made outside the specialist's comfort zone? S4, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Porsche 4Cam Vs. Steve Jobs' BMW Z8. Wayne brings home a 1957 Porsche 356A 1500 GS Carrera with a rare four-camshaft engine. And, Apple guru Steve Jobs' 2000 BMW Z8 goes up for sale. S10, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Racing Record Monza, Bucking Bronco, And Vincent Motos. Wayne rescues a rare '59 Fiat Abarth Record Monza that been abandoned for 30 years. Plus, he finds a custom '66 Ford Bronco. S10, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: One Car Wonder. It's Wayne's 1938 Lincoln Model K coupe vs. a 1938 Packard when Wayne and his friend compete at a car competition. Later, Wayne searches for the perfect Bugatti. S11, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: 3 Million Mile Volvo. Wayne lifts the lid on a Volvo that holds the world record for the highest mileage. Plus, he reverse engineers a gearless transmission for a 1912 Cartercar. S11, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bobble-Head Ache. The 67 GTO is ready for its debut, but the team isn't sure about Dave's colour choice. Polished panels, custom upholstery and a fierce engine make it stand out. S4, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: We Build Kindig Customs. Dave and the team start a one-of-a-kind build they have never attempted before, a 1964 Ranchero. But what there is underneath the metal sets the team back. S5, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: 24 Karat Magic. The Ranchero build is an epic achievement for Dave and the team, but will the client see it the same way? And will Dave find the perfect name for the perfect car? S5, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Bangla Bangers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Armed with nothing but old hammers, Bangladeshi car designer Leepu and Cockney mechanic Bernie transform a heap into the ultimate super-car. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Bangla Bangers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bernie and Leepu are looking for another rust bucket to turn into a super-car, but everything is in good condition. Luckily, a friend helps out. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Extinct Or Alive: Land Of The Lost Sharks
DMAXUK.uk.description: Biologist Forrest Galante dives into treacherous, shark-infested waters in the southern hemisphere to rediscover three unique sharks lost to science for as long as 100 years.

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alien Sharks: First Contact
DMAXUK.uk.description: Researchers try to make contact with bizarre alien sharks lurking in the deep. Pursuing the frilled shark, sleeper shark and cookie cutter shark brings unexpected encounters.

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Mothman. A team of researchers seeks answers to mysteries surrounding the Mothman. They explore theories that the legendary cryptid is an abnormality in the evolutionary chain. S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Chupacabra. Experts analyse new evidence that could prove the legendary bloodsucking beast known as Chupacabra is real, and that there are two versions of the creature! S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Van Meter Monster. Horrified locals in Iowa are reporting sightings of a giant winged creature - the same mysterious beast that terrorized the town of Van Meter 100 years ago. S3, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ghost Fort Of The Civil War. Phil and Jess gain unprecedented access to investigate ghostly voices and apparitions in Fort Morgan, a massive Civil War stronghold. S3, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: Civil War Ghosts In The Bay. Jess and Phil dive deeper into the tragic history of Fort Morgan. Amy Bruni and Adam Berry join them for the investigation. S3, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Baggage Battles
DMAXUK.uk.description: Man on Fire. The Baggage Battlers head to Greensboro, which is a major hub for imported and exported goods. But will they unearth any valuable items in the lot at Quality Salvage? S2, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Winds Of Misfortune - Part 1. A series of questionable calls by Kris brings the Mistress to her breaking point. Mr. Gold takes a huge gamble by mining Cooper Gulch. S11, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Winds Of Misfortune - Part 2. A series of questionable calls by Kris brings the Mistress to her breaking point. Mr. Gold takes a huge gamble by mining Cooper Gulch. S11, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Mine SOS
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Bates. Paul Mackie and his expert team must haul a crew of first-time gold miners out of an epic three-year gold drought before their operation and family legacy ends in ruin. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: The Snake Catcher
DMAXUK.uk.description: Blue Tongues And Hairy Legs. First, Julia deals with a large python hanging in a treetop. Next, the team catch a red-bellied black snake trapped in an air conditioning box. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Slap In The Face Or A Kick In The Butt. Mid-season and frozen crabs, frozen gear and a frozen harbour chill the hearts of the crew. Plus, the Northwestern battles a deadly storm. S5, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Ends Of The Earth. When the fleet gets word of great fishing by the ice pack, the chase is on. But will hellish hours and missing pots push these men over the edge? S5, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
DMAXUK.uk.description: Treasure Of The Trinity. Treasure hunters search for clues to a vast fortune they believe is hidden on Brazil's 'Snake Island.' But team tensions could derail the expedition. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Temple Of Doom. Josh Gates goes to the Cambodian jungle to explore the lost city of the Khmer Empire. He seeks a mystical relic believed to hold the power to incinerate enemies. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Legend of Jesse James. Josh travels across the American Midwest in search of Jesse James' legendary loot. He rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mountain and follows treasure hunters. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Homestead Of Horrors. There's a nightmare in North Carolina. A couple's ramshackle cabin has exposed wires in the shower livestock decimated by predators. Can the Raneys help? S1, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: Grizzly Bait. Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys take action with big builds - but tragedy strikes. S1, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Race Against Time. The Rookies battle busted hoses and finally hit treasure. Meanwhile, at their wash plant, the Cooke Brothers race to beat the worst drought in a decade. S2, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Desperate Times, Desperate Measures. Justin and Becky risk their lives underground. Plus, opal hunting legend Col Duff is back, hunting long forgotten treasure. S2, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: We Have Not Yet Begun to Fight. As the polar ice descends, The Saga is in danger of sinking, Jake must act fast to save his crew, and Josh gambles big-time by heading towards danger. S11, Ep18

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: My Face Is Killing Me. A Romanian boy's face grows too fast, slowly choking him to death, and doctors try a possible treatment. Plus, a child was born with an extra arm on his back. S5, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: Limbless Little Girl. An English girl whose limbs had to be amputated when she was born is fitted for prosthetics. A Polish man is the world's first recipient of a donor hand. S5, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: An angry confrontation could see Marcus, Linden and Dale thrown off their lease. Impurities in their gold force the Dust Devils to take a big gamble. S6, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: Hunted Humans. All-Stars: Hunted Humans. 13 all-star survivalists try to survive for 40 days in Africa's Selati Basin. When one group scavenges meat, hungry predators stalk their camp. S3,

DMAXUK.uk.title: Naked and Afraid XL
DMAXUK.uk.description: All-Stars: Africa Strikes First. One survivalist is attacked by a venomous predator just three days into the challenge. And, the group compete with aggressive wildlife for resources. S3, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bluefield House. The team go to the Bluefield House in West Virginia to restock classic warehouse commodities. Plus, they head up north to deliver a large lamppost. S10, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: No Jane, No Gain - Part 1. A brand-new arrival shakes up the gold game as Emily shows Jane Kilcher the ropes of running a dredge. Kris Kelly deals with an excavator malfunction. S11, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: No Jane, No Gain - Part 2. A brand-new arrival shakes up the gold game as Emily shows Jane Kilcher the ropes of running a dredge. Kris Kelly deals with an excavator malfunction. S11, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Mine SOS
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Gibsons. Paul Mackie and his team of experts travel to the unforgiving Western Australian Pilbara to help an Indigenous family gold mine save itself from financial disaster. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: The Snake Catcher
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Fatal Mistake. First, Julia catches a small venomous snake hidden under an air conditioning box. Plus, an eastern brown snake is spotted in a customer's garden. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bitter Tears. Weeks into the opilio season, delirium sets in - and deadly mistakes are made. But for one fisherman it is a tragedy on land that causes heartbreak at sea. S5, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Day Of Reckoning. The opilio season is almost over, but a storm front has the skippers on edge. The boats race to plug their tanks with crab, but can they make it back unscathed? S5, Ep15

DMAXUK.uk.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Opposite Of Paradise. The team gear up for their first venture onto Snake Island, where they'll face triple-digit heat and one of the world's deadliest vipers. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: World's 8th Wonder. Josh journeys from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. He retraces the steps of Nazi soldiers. S1, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Amelia Earhart. Josh Gates hunts down new evidence on the disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He starts in Papua New Guinea, ending his journey in Fiji, hoping to find her remains. S1, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: When Cows Attack. The Raneys arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build. S1, Ep13

DMAXUK.uk.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Bears And The Bees. The Raneys arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Plus, dangerous winds threaten the bathhouse. S1, Ep14

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Battling Back. The Fire Crew's season rests on a knife-edge as they battle their way back from a disastrous setback. Plus, the Opal Queen mines rock hard walls alone. S2, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Make Or Break. Justin tackles a deal that could make or break him. And, the Boulder Boys race to save their claim from a monsoon flood while the Cooke Brothers hit pay dirt. S2, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Carpe Diem. A new face joins the fold - 23-year-old Sean Dwyer fighting for the legacy of his father. Plus, Captain Keith's life spirals, and Sig torments his old protégé. S12, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.description: Gold On The Line. Frustrations reach a breaking point between Chambo and Andy. For Todd, it comes down to a single gold weigh to keep his crew intact. S2, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.description: Forged In Fury. Sig risks capsizing when his tank floods in an Arctic storm. Sophia must prove she can lead in severe weather while Jake battles insubordination. S20, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.description: A broken excavator shuts down the Ferals' operation. Jacqui finds the biggest nugget of her career, while the Poseidon Crew uncover a rubbish tip. S6, Ep17

Film4.uk.title: The Equalizer
Film4.uk.description: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

Film4.uk.title: The Frighteners
Film4.uk.description: (1996) Peter Jackson's comedy horror stars Michael J Fox as a psychic investigator in a town that has more ghouls and ghosties than you can shake a spirit stick at. But is he a fraud?

Film4.uk.title: Boss Level
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Major and the Minor
Film4.uk.description: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

Film4.uk.title: First Knight
Film4.uk.description: (1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?

Film4.uk.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance star in Steven Spielberg's Cold War spy drama. After gaining notoriety for defending a Soviet spy, a US lawyer then tries to free a CIA pilot.

Film4.uk.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

Film4.uk.title: Deja Vu
Film4.uk.description: (2006) Pulsating sci-fi action with Denzel Washington and Val Kilmer. An AFT agent uses new technology to reach back in time, stop a ferry bombing, and save the love of his life. Simple.

Film4.uk.title: Ambulance
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

Film4.uk.title: Fire Will Come
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Oliver Laxe's psychological drama follows Amador, a convicted arsonist, as he returns home from prison to his small community. In Galician and Spanish/subs.

Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: The Rare Breed
Film4.uk.description: (1966) Western with Maureen O'Hara and James Stewart. With the help of a drifter, a widow strives to fulfil her husband's last wish to introduce rare cattle to the perilous American west.

Film4.uk.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Western. A Union army deserter sets out to turn his Texan hometown's womenfolk into sharpshooters in order to repel a Comanche attack. Starring Audie Murphy and Kathryn Grant.

Film4.uk.title: Yellow Sky
Film4.uk.description: (1949) Western. Gregory Peck plays the leader of an outlaw gang whose plans to rob an old man and his granddaughter of their gold go seriously awry. With Anne Baxter and Richard Widmark.

Film4.uk.title: The Lavender Hill Mob
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Classic Ealing comedy starring Alec Guinness as a mild-mannered bank clerk who assembles a gang to hijack a million quid's worth of gold. Which is when their problems really start...

Film4.uk.title: Little Women
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Greta Gerwig's Oscar-winning period drama adaptation of the classic Louisa May Alcott novel, starring Emma Watson, Saoirse Ronan, Florence Pugh, Timothée Chalamet and Meryl Streep.

Film4.uk.title: The Menu
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

Film4.uk.title: Rocketman
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Taron Egerton is Elton John in Dexter Fletcher's sequins-and-all biopic musical drama. With Jamie Bell as lyricist Bernie Taupin and Stephen Graham as Dick James.

Film4.uk.title: Enduring Love
Film4.uk.description: (2004) In Roger Michell's drama, when Daniel Craig and Rhys Ifans witness a fatal ballooning accident, it arouses a violent obsession in one for the other. Strong language/violence.

Film4.uk.title: Magnificent Obsession
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

Film4.uk.title: The Frogmen
Film4.uk.description: (1951) Second World War thriller. Richard Widmark, Dana Andrews and Robert Wagner star as divers with a special underwater demolition team taking the war to the Japanese in the Pacific.

Film4.uk.title: It Should Happen to You
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Judy Holliday stars in this comedy as a smalltown girl who comes to New York and rents a billboard to publicise her name - and soon she's a TV star. With Jack Lemmon.

Film4.uk.title: Destination Gobi
Film4.uk.description: (1953) Fact-based Second World War adventure. Richard Widmark stars as a US Navy officer who leads an alliance of scientists and tribesmen against the Japanese in Mongolia.

Film4.uk.title: Entrapment
Film4.uk.description: (1999) Action thriller starring Sean Connery as Robert 'Mac' MacDougal, one of the world's finest art thieves, and Catherine Zeta-Jones as the insurance company agent out to trap him.

Film4.uk.title: Orphan: First Kill
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

Film4.uk.title: Alita: Battle Angel
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

ITV1CentralE.uk.title: ITV News
ITV1CentralE.uk.description: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.

ITV1CentralE.uk.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night

ITV1CentralE.uk.description: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

ITV1CentralE.uk.title: New: Fletchers' Family Farm

UAndW.uk.description: Award-winning comedy sketch series with characters played by the versatile actress. Tactful wigmakers to the stars Ivan and Trudy are introduced. Una Stubbs guest stars. S2 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Ambulance Australia
UAndW.uk.description: It's Australia Day and the paramedics are swamped with alcohol-related calls, including one about a man found passed out in his car in the middle of the road. S2 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Transgender Kids
UAndW.uk.description: Documentary following Louis Theroux as he travels to San Francisco where a group of pioneering medical professionals are helping children with gender dysphoria. Ep22

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Altered...
UAndW.uk.description: ...States: Love Without Limits. Louis travels to Portland, Oregon, and discovers a whole spectrum of non-traditional family set-ups: some that work and some that have been pushed to breaking point.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: The players face a colossal spinning wheel as they attempt to win a fortune with some help from Peter Andre, Rob Beckett and Patricia Bright. S2 Ep15

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: You Don't Know Jack: The top-rated domestic sitcom with former Citizen Smith and Extras guest star, Robert Lindsay. Michael has a new friend in school and Susan has a new admirer. S5 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: What's up, Docklands?: Putting the beef into the domestic sitcom. Ben and Susan decide to help out some friends by flat sitting their brand-new Docklands apartment. S5 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Luck Be a Lady Tonight: Popular domestic sitcom. Susan suggests Roger should make Abi jealous, and Ben despairs. S5 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: First Past the Post: Family fun with the eccentric Harper family, starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker. With a burst of civic pride, Susan decides to run for the council. S5 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: My Will Be Done: Zoe Wanamaker is one half of a quirky couple in the popular sitcom. Ben thinks about his will and Nick takes a job at a funeral director's. S5 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: My Fair Charlady: Here's something most Mums dream about in the popular sitcom. Susan employs a cleaner, who turns out to be such a treasure that she takes over the cooking as well. S5 Ep8

UAndW.uk.description: Sunny, Bertie & Edith: Bouncy Golden Retriever puppy Bertie has a dislocated hip, Tibetan terrier Sunny is almost immobile, and Springer Spaniel Edith has a bulging spinal disc. S7 Ep10

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Domino, Diamond, Willow & Luigi: Pop superstar Will Young brings in two of his rescue dogs, Domino and Diamond, while supermodel Yasmin Le Bon's French Bulldog Willow collapses at home. S7 Ep11

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Monty, Odin & Maya: Caucasian Shepherd Odin has Wobbler Syndrome, Toy Poodle Monty needs a total hip replacement, and Malamute Husky Cross Maya needs to get back on her four feet again. S8 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Poppy, Keira & Bella: In this puppy special, Noel treats Border Terrier Kiera, and we look back at Springer Spaniel Poppy, who had one of the worst leg deformities Noel had ever seen. S8 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Pretzel, Bran & Wobble: In this rescue special, we meet abandoned kitten Pretzel with severely twisted back legs, and look back at Wobble the Whippet and three-legged German Shepherd Bran. S8 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital. S10 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: Crews from West Midlands Ambulance Service attend a diabetic who has collapsed at home, reassure the wife of a man with heart problems and keep up the spirits of a woman with womb cancer. S10 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: A girl has an operation to have squints in both eyes realigned, a man has his infected gall bladder removed and an ex-police officer is having a grommet inserted in her ear. S2 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: A woman has an operation to repair the hernia she suffered while giving birth and a four-year-old's ear blockage is so bad he needs a general anaesthetic to it sucked out. S2 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
UAndW.uk.description: Every Student Counts: Student midwives Ruby and Grace are in the second year of their studies and are now learning on the job. Summah and her friend Lilli enjoy cocktails and a takeaway. S1 Ep3

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: My Dream Home
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Drew and Jonathan Scott help another person create their dream home. In this edition the pair come to the aid of Karima, who wants to find a deluxe urban home of her own. S5 Ep22

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: My Dream Home
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Property renovation series hosted by Drew and Jonathan Scott. Globetrotting Aussies Levi and Alysha are looking for their dream home in their dream city. S5 Ep23

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Celebrating 20 Years: Nick Knowles takes to the road to catch up with families and communities featured over the last two decades, and to find out what happened after the cameras left. S31 Ep1

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Tom, Otis & Bailey: A four-year-old French bulldog suffers a spinal injury being chased by another dog in the park, while a rescue Labrador has a wounded paw. S5 Ep13

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: The response team race to the rescue of a worker trapped in a collapsed trench, and paramedic Kim must risk her own life to give him medical treatment 10ft underground. S2 Ep1

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: One Born Every Minute
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Heart-warming maternity series. There's a special delivery on the ward as midwife Linda Abbott comes out of retirement. Two expectant dads adopt contrasting bedside manners. S4 Ep5

UAndWPlus1.uk.title: One Born Every Minute
UAndWPlus1.uk.description: Heartwarming maternity series. The midwives are snowed under as the September baby boom begins. Also, second-time mum Natalie wants to do things differently this time around. S4 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Datsun 240Z/Rover Mini Cooper: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Fiat X1/9 / Austin A60 Cambridge: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek sells vehicles from TV show Heartbeat, love for an Austin Cambridge, and a sporty Italian number getting rehomed. S3 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Capri 1300L/Honda S800: A rare Honda S800 sports car from 1967 takes Derek's fancy, and a couple of very different Ford Capris with long histories go head-to-head at the auction. S3 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Morris Traveller / Subaru Impreza P: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess, and meet a collector who may be willing to part with a huge hot hatch collection. S3 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Ford RS2000/Austin Healey Sprite: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey 'frogeye' Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction. S3 Ep9

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Springhill Junction to Quebec City: Michael Portillo continues his journey to Quebec City, during which he investigates the world's biggest tide. S4 Ep7

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Sainte-Anne-de-Beaupre to Winnipeg: Michael Portillo explores the Province of Quebec, taking the Charlevoix train along the bank of the St Lawrence River to La Malbaie. S4 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Oxford to Reading: Robbie's narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak. S6 Ep3

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Reading to Windsor: Robbie visits a former Beatle's home in Henley, uncovers horror history in Marlow and struggles to find a mooring in Maidenhead on the River Thames. S6 Ep4

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterday.uk.description: New. Paul and Suki head to Wales - where the roads make Paul nervous - as they pitch up at its biggest natural lake and try paddle boarding and synchronised swimming. S2 Ep5

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterday.uk.description: New. Suki and Paul are in Yorkshire as they stay at the famous Tan Hill Inn, arrange a sheep dog training session, and visit the incredible Ribblehead Viaduct. S2 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Frozen Planet
UAndYesterday.uk.description: To the Ends of the Earth: David Attenborough reveals the vast wilderness of the polar regions. At the North Pole, polar bears court and the sun returns after six months of dark. S1 Ep1
